betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The aspects of Order.
A simple word, yet encompassing so much.
The will of life, order arising from randomness, in spite of randomness, in spite of death.
Precision, creativity, curiosity, determination, courage, attentiveness, strength. The virtues of the Arbiter.
The Mission of my nemesis, and at the same time, the tenets that brough me here, that made me who I am.
As a paradigm of Chaos, as the aspect of Death, I bow to Order, I bring my offer to Life.
The final act, to close the loop, to restart the rolling of the wheel. To restore balance.
My role must played, just like everyone else's. And if the Mission is abandoned, it will be undertaken anew, sooner or later.
Because there is a goal, an end, a direction.
Even as a Fractallite, I cannot claim to know this will in its entirety, but it guides my Mission, and it will guide the Arbiter's.
That is why there are many among the Ascended. The will is infinite, and as such, it cannot be captured by a single individual.
The Mission is multiplicitous, because everyone must play their part, make the best of the hand they are dealt.
And, after playing my part in this story, I will let someone else continue it...
